description.value: [FORBIDDEN KNOWLEDGE] Bind soul fragments or echoes to 1 corpse, animating it as a skeleton or zombie under your control. Undead has HP equal to your Negative Potential × 4, deals [[/damage 6]] damage, uses your Negative Mastery for attacks. Can command as [Free] action.

system.effect: [FORBIDDEN KNOWLEDGE] Bind soul fragments or echoes to 1 corpse, animating it as a skeleton or zombie under your control. Undead has HP equal to your Negative Potential × 4, deals 6 damage, uses your Negative Mastery for attacks. Can command as [Free] action.
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
